item.title: 现在的 ai 域名怎么这么难注册，注册一个 ai 域名至少要一千人民币，成本这么高竟然还被人大量囤货。我选了好几周都没能捡到心仪的域名。
item.author: @waylybaye

item.title:
My takeaway:
Audio is finally becoming interactive. You don’t mix sound anymore, you point at inten...
item.description:
My takeaway:
Audio is finally becoming interactive. You don’t mix sound anymore, you point at intent.
That’s what Meta’s SAM Audio project is pointing toward, and it has real implications for creators, product teams, and anyone building with multimodal AI.
Watch the full video to see how it works in practice.
Don't miss out on the latest AI advancements! Sign up here to stay informed! https://t.co/IfnVBcS8m2
--- @Ronald_vanLoon | ❤️ 0 | 🔁 0 | 💬 0 | 👁 84
item.author: @Ronald_vanLoon

item.title:
Under the hood, the model does one powerful thing:
It splits sound into two parts →
→ The target s...
item.description:
Under the hood, the model does one powerful thing:
It splits sound into two parts →
→ The target sound → Everything else
That single capability unlocks a lot →
→ Faster editing for creators → Cleaner, more controllable data for AI training → Multimodal systems that understand sound like visuals
This is basically segmentation, but for audio.
--- @Ronald_vanLoon | ❤️ 0 | 🔁 0 | 💬 1 | 👁 83
item.author: @Ronald_vanLoon

item.title:
What if cleaning audio was as easy as clicking on a pixel?
Not tweaking EQs. Not guessing with filt...
item.description:
What if cleaning audio was as easy as clicking on a pixel?
Not tweaking EQs. Not guessing with filters.
Just pointing to the sound you want, and telling the AI, keep this.
I’ve been digging into @Meta’s latest work, and it quietly changes how we think about audio editing. https://t.co/xag6nbEavd
--- @Ronald_vanLoon | ❤️ 1 | 🔁 0 | 💬 1 | 👁 106
item.author: @Ronald_vanLoon
